title: 80 Numbered Dual Tip Colouring Pens with Free App,Felt Tip Pens for Adult Colouring Books,Brush Markers Art Supplies for Calligraphy Drawing Sketching Journaling Painting
features: 【Product Features】 All colouring pens have a numerical colour code, and arranged neatly according to the colour sequence number. We provide an App that can recognize colours, match and recommend the colour code closest to this colour. By the colour code on the pen body, you can quickly find the pen you need! The App also provides functions such as graffiti colouring, colour schemes, and electronic colour cards, waiting for you to explore.

【Dual Brush Pens】 The dual tip design allows for easy switching, creating precise details and bold or thin lines. The 0.4mm fine tip is perfect for sketching outlines and details, while the 1-6mm soft brush tip is suitable for shading, colouring, and handwriting. We have included a doodle card and colour card as a gift, allowing you to experience our dual brush pens right away.

【Vibrant Colours】 80 colour coded dual tip brush pens. The high-quality water-based ink seamlessly blends, creating beautiful colouring effects without worrying about smudges or uneven colouring. The rich and vivid colours inspire artistic creativity and allow for easy layering and mixing. Suitable for various art activities, including designing animals, flowers, patterns, drawing, sketching, and calligraphy.

【App Feature】 The App features include intelligent algorithm-based recommendations for the most suitable colour codes for dual brush pens for drawing. It provides rich doodle materials and colour schemes to enhance your drawing experience. The App also offers professional HUE colour matching functionality and an electronic colour card feature for easy access to colour references.

【Great Gift】 The dual tip pens comes with an advanced storage bag, which can be an ideal gift for mothers, women, men, adults, teachers, college students, beginners, and artists as thoughtful gifts. It is suitable for various artistic activities, such as bullet journaling note taking planner hand lettering calligraphy drawing. It is an ideal gift for Christmas, anniversaries, Valentine's Day, graduation ceremonies, Halloween and birthdays.
